name: moat_comparison — definition_of_moat
what_it_solves: Declared definition of 'moat' used to score each dimension.
why_it_exists: Without an explicit definition, PARITY/EDGE/GAP labels are subjective; this makes them reproducible.

attributes.raw: Defensible methodological features that distinguish CrisPRO's approach from established or emerging competitors. Moat ≠ moral superiority; moat = features competitors cannot easily replicate without comparable infrastructure, expertise, or data access.
